calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2019 Off Calendar

Final Fairness Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sean Blakely, Esq. 424-292-2350 of Haines Law Group, APC for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Aaron Lubeley, Esq. 213-270-9600 of Seyfarth Shaw LLP for Defendant through Court Call.

Hearing is held. The Court announces there was no "opt out" and no Opposition by the Class Members. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Final Fairness Hearing.

There being no "opt out" and no Opposition by the Class Members, the Court grants Plaintiff's motion for final approval of class action settlement, class representative's service award, and attorneys' fees and costs.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Class Representatives Service Award, And Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sean Blakely, Esq. 424-292-2350 of Haines Law Group, APC for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Aaron Lubeley, Esq. 213-270-9600 of Seyfarth Shaw LLP for Defendant through Court Call.

Hearing is held. The Court announces there was no "opt out" and there was no Opposition by Class Memebers. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF SEUNGMIN LEE's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Class Representatives Service Award, And Attorneys' Fees And Costs.

The Court has reviewed the supplemental declarations. Plaintiff's motion for final approval of class action settlement, class representative's service award, and attorneys' fees and costs is granted.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Final Fairness Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-11-2019 Continued To Oct-24-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sean M. Blakely, Esq. of Haines Law Group, T:424.292.2350, for plaintiff;
Aaron R. Lubeley, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP, T:213.271.9600, for defendant.

RULING: Hearing held. On the Court's own motion, the FAIRNESS HEARING RE: FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT is continued to October 24, 2019 at 9:30am, to be heard with the Motion for Attorney's Fees and Costs.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Class Representatives Service Award, And Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Oct-11-2019 Continued To Oct-24-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sean M. Blakely, Esq. of Haines Law Group, T:424.292.2350, for plaintiff;
Aaron R. Lubeley, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP, T:213.271.9600, for defendant.

RULING: Hearing held. The costs and fees were discussed. After hearing, the Court orders that:

PLAINTIFF SEUNGMIN LEE's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Class Representatives Service Award, And Attorneys' Fees And Costs is continued to October 24, 2019 at 9:30am. Plaintiffs to file by October 18 a declaration of counsel addressing the lodestar issues and a supplemental declaration by the settlement administrator as to the total charge for sending out the notices and a detailed explanation for it.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
